title: Greenhouse retrofit into core-resumes
conventions: Read AGENTS.md before starting any task
Apply the Cloudflare Jedi skill conventions: docstrings, modular folders, health.ts per module, no flat schemas, no hardcoded data
Never hand-edit migrations — always pnpm run db:generate
Never run wrangler deploy directly — always pnpm run deploy
After any wrangler.jsonc change run pnpm run cf-typegen
Every Workers AI call must route through env.AI_GATEWAY_ID
Every new file gets a @file docstring; every export gets a JSDoc; sections > 20 lines get banner comments
Update task status to in_progress before starting and completed when done
If you get stuck or need to verify a Cloudflare API, run: ask --cloudflare-docs "<your query>" > docs/cloudflare-docs/<short-name>.md, then read the saved file

tasks.title: Add Vectorize, R2 jobs bucket, GEMINI_API_KEY, env vars
tasks.details: Per PRD Phase 1. Add VECTORIZE_JOBS binding (index_name greenhouse-jobs, remote=true). Add R2_JOBS_BUCKET (bucket_name core-resumes-jobs, remote=true). Add GEMINI_API_KEY secrets_store_secrets entry (store_id 8c42fa70938644e0a8a109744467375f, secret_name GEMINI_API_KEY). Add vars: AI_GATEWAY_NAME, GREENHOUSE_API_BASE, VECTORIZE_INDEX_NAME, VECTORIZE_DIMENSIONS=768, MODEL_EMBED_JOBS=gemini-embedding-001, MODEL_TRIAGE=@cf/openai/gpt-oss-120b, DEFAULT_BOARD_TOKENS=cloudflare,vercel,anthropic,headway.
acceptance_criteria: wrangler.jsonc parses (pnpm run cf-typegen succeeds)
Env global types include VECTORIZE_JOBS (Vectorize index), R2_JOBS_BUCKET (R2 bucket), GEMINI_API_KEY (SecretsStoreSecret)
All new vars typed as string in Env

tasks.title: Add JobScannerAgent + JobAnalysisAgent durable objects + migrations v4/v5
tasks.details: Add durable_objects.bindings entries: JOB_SCANNER_AGENT (class JobScannerAgent), JOB_ANALYSIS_AGENT (class JobAnalysisAgent). Add migrations entries v4 (new_sqlite_classes: JobScannerAgent), v5 (new_sqlite_classes: JobAnalysisAgent).
acceptance_criteria: pnpm run cf-typegen succeeds
Env global types JOB_SCANNER_AGENT and JOB_ANALYSIS_AGENT as DurableObjectNamespace

tasks.title: Add second cron trigger 0 */6 * * *
tasks.details: Append to triggers.crons array. Branch logic added later in Phase 12 task 12.1.
acceptance_criteria: wrangler.jsonc cron list contains both 0 */4 * * * and 0 */6 * * *

tasks.title: Create category folders + git mv existing schemas
tasks.details: Run: git mv src/backend/db/schemas/{roles,role-analyses,role-alignment-scores,documents}.ts src/backend/db/schemas/applications/. Run: git mv src/backend/db/schemas/resume-bullets.ts src/backend/db/schemas/career/. Run: git mv src/backend/db/schemas/{threads,messages,emails}.ts src/backend/db/schemas/communications/. Run: git mv src/backend/db/schemas/{health-screenings,global-config,job-failures}.ts src/backend/db/schemas/system/. Each new index.ts re-exports the schemas in that folder.
acceptance_criteria: Files moved per PRD Phase 2 final structure
Each category index.ts re-exports every named export from its schema files

tasks.title: Update top-level src/backend/db/schema.ts barrel
tasks.details: Re-export from ./schemas/applications, ./schemas/career, ./schemas/communications, ./schemas/system, ./schemas/jobs. Preserve every previously-exported identifier so consumers' wildcard imports keep working.
acceptance_criteria: tsc --noEmit reports zero export-shape regressions
drizzle-kit can still find every table from the barrel

tasks.title: Update all import paths across codebase for schema moves
files_modified: multiple — all consumers of schema files
tasks.details: Find consumers: rg "from .*db/schemas/(roles|documents|threads|messages|emails|resume-bullets|role-analyses|role-alignment-scores|health-screenings|global-config|job-failures)" -t ts. Update each import to point at the new category folder (or, preferably, at the @/backend/db/schema barrel). Verify pnpm run types passes.
acceptance_criteria: rg shows zero matches against the old flat paths
pnpm run types — zero errors

tasks.title: Add `source` and `source_snapshot_id` columns to roles schema
tasks.details: Add columns: source: text("source").notNull().default("manual"), source_snapshot_id: text("source_snapshot_id"). Update ROLES_COLUMN_DESCRIPTIONS with snake_case keys. Update insertRolesSchema/selectRolesSchema (drizzle-zod will pick up automatically). Add a TypeScript union type for source: "manual" | "greenhouse_scan" | "email".
acceptance_criteria: tsc clean
ROLES_COLUMN_DESCRIPTIONS has source and source_snapshot_id keys

tasks.title: Create jobs/boards schemas
tasks.details: Port from Python /Volumes/Projects/greenhouse/app/db.py: BoardToken (token unique, is_active bool, created_at). BoardTemplateAnalysis (company text, css_selectors json, salary_markers json, structural_notes text, created_at).
acceptance_criteria: Each schema file exports table + insert/select Zod schemas + types + TABLE_DESCRIPTION + COLUMN_DESCRIPTIONS
Index.ts re-exports both

tasks.title: Create jobs/postings schemas
tasks.details: jobs_postings: id, job_site_id (unique), job_title, company, date_first_seen, triage_passed, triage_reason, analysis_executed, is_favorite. jobs_snapshots: id, job_id (FK→jobs_postings.id), snapshot_timestamp, vectorize_id (UUID), session_uuid, raw_assessment_json, match_score, verdict, builder_alignment, jd_trap_detected, job_summary, salary_min/max/currency, benefits_*, historic_comparison, negotiation_strategy, extracted_location, experience_level, is_manual_reprocess, reprocess_rationale, archive_md_key (R2), archive_pdf_key (R2), archive_html_key (R2). Reference: /Volumes/Projects/greenhouse/app/db.py.
acceptance_criteria: Both schemas exported with TABLE_DESCRIPTION + COLUMN_DESCRIPTIONS (snake_case)
Foreign keys typed correctly

tasks.title: Create jobs/analysis schemas
tasks.details: job_req_snapshots: snapshot_id (FK), requirement (text), match_score (1-10), match_rationale. Same shape for skills and responsibilities. job_notebook_consultations (NEW): id, snapshot_id (FK), question, answer, references_json, turn_number, conversation_id, created_at. ai_log_workers_ai: timestamp, model, direction, job_title, schema_target, input_tokens, output_tokens, response_preview, duration_seconds, error, http_status.
acceptance_criteria: All five schemas exported with descriptions

tasks.title: Create jobs/taxonomy schemas
tasks.details: Port from Python: job_categories (name unique, description, is_active, created_at). job_category_mappings (job_category_id FK, job_snapshot_id FK, ai_rationale). job_category_hitl_feedback (category_mapping_id FK, signal up/down/added, user_rationale, created_at). Same triplet for tags.
acceptance_criteria: All six schemas exported with descriptions

tasks.title: Create jobs/hitl/hitl-reviews schema
tasks.details: hitl_reviews: id, snapshot_id FK, human_fit (high/medium/low/trap), human_fit_reason, human_match_score (0-100), human_match_reason, additional_notes, reviewed_at.
acceptance_criteria: Schema exported with descriptions

tasks.title: Create jobs/sessions/session-runs schema
tasks.details: session_runs: id, session_uuid unique, timestamp, total_scraped, total_triaged, total_analyzed, total_failed, total_cost_usd, taxonomy_categories, taxonomy_tags.
acceptance_criteria: Schema exported with descriptions

tasks.title: Create jobs/lists schemas
tasks.details: starred_job_lists (name, description, is_active, created_at). starred_job_list_mappings (list_id FK, job_id FK, is_deleted, created_at — soft delete pattern).
acceptance_criteria: Both schemas exported with descriptions

tasks.title: Create jobs/index.ts barrel
tasks.details: Re-export from ./boards, ./postings, ./analysis, ./taxonomy, ./hitl, ./sessions, ./lists.
acceptance_criteria: src/backend/db/schema.ts can import * as jobs from "./schemas/jobs"

tasks.title: Generate + apply migration
tasks.details: Run pnpm run db:generate. Review the migration: every new jobs/* table appears once, plus the two roles columns. No spurious renames or drops. Run pnpm run migrate:local to validate locally. DO NOT run migrate:remote until Phase 13.
acceptance_criteria: Migration applies cleanly on local D1
drizzle/migrations contains exactly one new SQL file for this batch
No table-rename statements (proves the file moves were schema-neutral)

tasks.title: Install @google/genai dependency
tasks.details: pnpm add @google/genai. Verify it bundles cleanly under workerd (no Node-only crypto or fs imports).
acceptance_criteria: pnpm run build succeeds with the new dep

tasks.title: Create google-ai-studio.ts provider
tasks.details: Implements AIProvider (invokeModel, invokeStructured, streamModel). Build the GoogleGenAI client with baseUrl from env.AI.gateway(env.AI_GATEWAY_NAME).getUrl("google-ai-studio"). Pass cf-aig-authorization: Bearer <CLOUDFLARE_AI_GATEWAY_TOKEN.get()> as a request header. Include user GEMINI_API_KEY as apiKey for now (documented BYOK fallback). See PRD 'BYOK Gemini path'. If unsure of @google/genai client construction options, run ask --cloudflare-docs "google-ai-studio gemini SDK base URL httpOptions" > docs/cloudflare-docs/gemini-sdk.md.
acceptance_criteria: Class exports cleanly and conforms to AIProvider interface
All Cloudflare bindings accessed via env (no module-level state)

tasks.title: Create gemini-embedding-001 model descriptor
tasks.details: Mirror the existing gpt-oss-120b descriptor pattern. input: Zod schema for { text: string | string[] }. serialize(): builds Gemini batchEmbedContents request with outputDimensionality: parseInt(env.VECTORIZE_DIMENSIONS). parseResponse(): extracts embeddings[].values arrays. Include the task: retrieval document and task: retrieval query prefixes (port from /Volumes/Projects/greenhouse/app/vectorize_service.py _build_embedding_text).
acceptance_criteria: Descriptor produces Float arrays of length 768
Zod input schema rejects empty strings

tasks.title: Update providers/index.ts and models/index.ts
tasks.details: providers/index.ts: extend ProviderName = 'workers-ai' | 'google-ai-studio'. Switch in getProvider(). Add embedJobsBatch(env, texts) and embedJobsQuery(env, text) helpers wrapping the new provider+model. models/index.ts: add embedJobs to the registry returned by getModelRegistry(env), pulling MODEL_EMBED_JOBS env var.
acceptance_criteria: embedJobsQuery(env, 'ping') returns number[] of length 768 in test
Existing generateStructuredOutput/streamChat untouched

tasks.title: Refactor existing single-file agents to folder form
tasks.details: Convert colby.ts → colby/. Split methods (scrape_job, extract_job_details, consult_notebook, create_doc_from_template, etc.) into colby/methods/<name>.ts each. Keep class name OrchestratorAgent. Same treatment for notebooklm.ts and notebooklm-mcp.ts. The DO migration tags don't change because class names stay identical.
acceptance_criteria: wrangler.jsonc DO bindings still resolve
pnpm run build + pnpm run dev — agents still register
WebSocket / RPC behavior unchanged

tasks.title: Create JobScannerAgent folder + methods
tasks.details: Class JobScannerAgent extends Agent<Env, { runs: Record<string, RunState>, queue: AnalyzeJob[] }>. RPC: scanBoard(token), scanAll(), getRunStatus(sessionId). onConnect handler streams ScanProgress events over WebSocket. Scheduled callback every 30s drains queue and forwards to JobAnalysisAgent via stub. health.ts probes greenhouse API (HEAD on one known board) + DB connectivity.
acceptance_criteria: DO instantiates without error
scanBoard('cloudflare') populates jobs_postings + enqueues analyses
WebSocket clients receive { type: 'scan-progress', token, scraped, triaged }

tasks.title: Create JobAnalysisAgent folder + methods
tasks.details: Class JobAnalysisAgent. RPC: analyze(snapshotId), reanalyze(jobSiteId, hitlContext). State tracks per-snapshot phase. Each method file owns one phase: consult-notebook generates N questions and calls existing consultNotebook helper, persists to job_notebook_consultations. deep-analyze invokes gpt-oss-120b structured output with the analysis schema and notebook evidence injected. persist writes snapshot, requirements, taxonomy. archive captures markdown + pdf via browser-rendering services. embed calls embedJobsBatch and upserts to Vectorize. Each phase is independently retryable on failure.
acceptance_criteria: analyze(snapshotId) completes all 5 phases for a real Greenhouse posting
Each phase failure is logged + retried on next scheduled tick
vectorize_id on the snapshot matches the upserted Vectorize id

tasks.title: Create services/jobs/scraper
tasks.details: Port /Volumes/Projects/greenhouse/app/scraper.py functions to TypeScript. fetch-board: GET ${GREENHOUSE_API_BASE}/{token}/jobs?content=true → list of job objects. parse: use linkedom or htmlparser2 (pnpm add linkedom — workerd-compatible). Implement heal_html, _strip_boilerplate (remove .content-intro, .content-conclusion, About Us blocks), extract_plain_text, extract_location_info, extract_requirements_snippet. apply-template: per-company CSS-selector based stripping using board_template_analyses rows.
acceptance_criteria: fetchBoard('cloudflare') returns >=1 job object
parse(rawHtml) returns clean plain text matching Python output for a snapshot test

tasks.title: Create services/jobs/archive
tasks.details: markdown: POST https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/{await env.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.get()}/browser-rendering/markdown with Authorization: Bearer {await env.CF_BROWSER_RENDER_TOKEN.get()}, body { url }. pdf: same shape, /pdf endpoint. r2-keys: helper buildR2Key(token, jobSiteId, snapshotId, kind) → string. Both helpers write to env.R2_JOBS_BUCKET. health: write+read+delete a tiny test object. If you need to verify the request shape run ask --cloudflare-docs "browser rendering rest api markdown pdf request body" > docs/cloudflare-docs/browser-rendering.md.
acceptance_criteria: captureJobMarkdown(env, url) writes a non-empty .md file to R2 and returns its key
captureJobPdf(env, url) writes a non-empty .pdf binary to R2 and returns its key

tasks.title: Create services/jobs/vectorize
tasks.details: upsert: takes snapshot records, calls embedJobsBatch, calls env.VECTORIZE_JOBS.upsert(). Mirror metadata shape from /Volumes/Projects/greenhouse/app/vectorize_service.py (company, title, verdict, match_score, salary_min/max). query: takes natural-language query, calls embedJobsQuery, then env.VECTORIZE_JOBS.query(vector, { topK, returnMetadata: 'all' }). health: query a known test vector, assert at least 0 matches.
acceptance_criteria: upsertSnapshotVectors([record]) returns count=1
searchSimilarJobs('senior engineer', 5) returns 0..5 matches with metadata

tasks.title: Create services/jobs/triage
tasks.details: prompt: port TRIAGE_PROMPT from /Volumes/Projects/greenhouse/app/config.py — candidate stories baked in. batch: pack jobs into context-aware groups (~30% of model context reserved for schema+response). run: calls generateStructuredOutput with gpt-oss-120b and a Zod schema { decisions: [{ job_site_id, decision: 'Include' | 'Exclude', reasoning }] }.
acceptance_criteria: runTriage(env, [job1, job2, job3]) returns decisions for all three
Reasoning is non-empty when decision = 'Include'

tasks.title: Create services/jobs/analysis
tasks.details: schema: port JobAssessment Pydantic model from /Volumes/Projects/greenhouse/app/models.py to Zod (match_score, verdict, builder_alignment, salary, benefits, story alignment, per-requirement scores, taxonomy). prompt: port JOB_ASSESSMENT_PROMPT from app/config.py. notebook-questions: Zod schema { questions: string[] } and a small extraction prompt that turns a job posting + candidate stories into 5–8 targeted NotebookLM queries.
acceptance_criteria: JobAssessment Zod schema deeply matches Python Pydantic model
buildNotebookQuestions(env, jobPosting) returns string[5..8]

tasks.title: Create services/jobs/hitl/load-context
tasks.details: Port get_hitl_context_for_analysis from /Volumes/Projects/greenhouse/app/db.py — fetches similar HITL reviews (same company or overlapping categories) to calibrate the AI scoring prompt. Returns a structured context block.
acceptance_criteria: loadHitlContext(env, { company, categories }) returns array of past reviews

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/tokens routes
tasks.details: GET /api/jobs/tokens (list), POST /api/jobs/tokens (create), PATCH /api/jobs/tokens/:id (toggle is_active). Use OpenAPIHono + zod-openapi. Reference existing routes for the auto-doc pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Routes appear in /openapi.json

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/scan + WebSocket route
tasks.details: POST /api/jobs/scan { token } → calls JobScannerAgent stub, returns { sessionId }. WebSocket /api/jobs/scan/ws — proxies to the agent's WebSocket so the frontend can subscribe to ScanProgress events. Uses Hono's upgrade helper.
acceptance_criteria: POST returns sessionId immediately (non-blocking)
WebSocket upgrades and forwards messages from the DO

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/pipeline route
tasks.details: POST /api/jobs/pipeline → calls JobScannerAgent.scanAll(). Returns sessionId for tracking.
acceptance_criteria: Triggers a scan across every active board_token

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs list + detail routes
tasks.details: GET /api/jobs supports filters: company, since (ISO timestamp), score_min, score_max, verdict, fav. Returns paginated. GET /api/jobs/:job_site_id/history returns full history (snapshots, requirements, skills, responsibilities, applications, HITL reviews, notebook consultations).
acceptance_criteria: Filters compose cleanly via Drizzle and()
/history nests all related rows

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/search route
tasks.details: GET /api/jobs/search?q=&top_k=5 → calls searchSimilarJobs. Returns [{ id, score, metadata }].
acceptance_criteria: q='senior engineer' returns 0..5 ranked results

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/taxonomy routes
tasks.details: GET/POST /api/jobs/categories, GET/POST /api/jobs/tags. POST /api/jobs/snapshots/:id/add-category, /add-tag. DELETE for mappings.
acceptance_criteria: CRUD complete

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/hitl routes
tasks.details: POST /api/jobs/:job_site_id/review (human fit + match + notes). POST /api/jobs/category-feedback (thumbs up/down). POST /api/jobs/tag-feedback.
acceptance_criteria: All three endpoints persist and return 201

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/lists routes
tasks.details: GET/POST /api/jobs/lists. POST /api/jobs/lists/:id/add. DELETE /api/jobs/lists/:id/jobs/:jobId (soft delete).
acceptance_criteria: Soft-delete preserves audit trail

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/archive routes (markdown + pdf streaming)
tasks.details: GET /api/jobs/:snapshot_id/markdown → loads archive_md_key from D1, fetches from R2, streams with Content-Type: text/markdown. GET /api/jobs/:snapshot_id/pdf → same pattern, application/pdf.
acceptance_criteria: <iframe src='/api/jobs/<id>/pdf' /> renders PDF inline in Chrome
Markdown route content matches what was stored on archive

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/analytics routes
tasks.details: GET /api/jobs/stats/boards (per-token aggregates). GET /api/jobs/companies/:token/analytics (verdict distribution, category/tag pies, salary bars, location markers).
acceptance_criteria: Frontend CompanyProfile.tsx renders without empty states

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/:snapshot_id/apply route
tasks.details: POST /api/jobs/:snapshot_id/apply → 1) fetch snapshot + parent job 2) insert into roles with title, company, salary_min, salary_max, job_posting_url, source='greenhouse_scan', source_snapshot_id, status='preparing' 3) return { role_id }.
acceptance_criteria: Returns role_id pointing at a real row
Subsequent GET /api/roles/:id resolves cleanly

tasks.title: Create /api/jobs/:job_site_id/reprocess route
tasks.details: POST /api/jobs/:job_site_id/reprocess → loads HITL context via services/jobs/hitl/load-context, calls JobAnalysisAgent.reanalyze(jobSiteId, hitlContext). Returns the new snapshotId.
acceptance_criteria: A new snapshot row appears with is_manual_reprocess=true

tasks.title: Mount /api/jobs router in api/index.ts
tasks.details: jobs/index.ts hangs every subrouter under app.route('/...', ...). api/index.ts mounts app.route('/api/jobs', jobsRouter).
acceptance_criteria: Every route appears in /openapi.json
GET /scalar renders all of them

tasks.title: Install leaflet + leaflet.markercluster + types
tasks.details: pnpm add leaflet leaflet.markercluster @types/leaflet @types/leaflet.markercluster.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm run build succeeds

tasks.title: Create /jobs/index.astro + CommandCenter.tsx
tasks.details: Port from /Volumes/Projects/greenhouse/frontend/src/components/CommandCenter.tsx. Drop BACKEND_PORT env constant; use same-origin fetch. Replace EventSource with WebSocket (PipelineProgress component). Wrap in BaseLayout.astro. Use client:only='react' island per existing pattern.
acceptance_criteria: /jobs renders the table with no console errors
Empty state shows when no jobs exist (no mock data)

tasks.title: Extract JobsTable + JobDetailModal components
tasks.details: Split table + modal out of CommandCenter for reuse on /jobs/history. JobDetailModal has tabs: Summary, HITL Review, Notebook Evidence, Markdown, PDF, Apply.
acceptance_criteria: CommandCenter file shrinks (table+modal moved out)
Tabs deep-link via ?tab= on the modal

tasks.title: Create JobMarkdownViewer + JobPdfViewer
tasks.details: Markdown viewer fetches /api/jobs/:id/markdown and pipes through src/frontend/components/assistant-ui/markdown-text.tsx. PDF viewer is just a shadcn Dialog with an <iframe src='/api/jobs/:id/pdf' className='w-full h-[80vh]' />.
acceptance_criteria: Markdown renders with code blocks + headings styled per existing theme
PDF iframe loads inline (no download prompt)

tasks.title: Create ApplyButton with confirmation
tasks.details: shadcn AlertDialog confirms 'Start application for {title} at {company}?'. On confirm: POST /api/jobs/:snapshot_id/apply → on success window.location.assign(`/roles/${role_id}`). NEVER use window.confirm.
acceptance_criteria: Click → AlertDialog opens
Confirm → POSTs and redirects to /roles/:id

tasks.title: Create HitlReviewTab
tasks.details: Port from /Volumes/Projects/greenhouse/frontend/src/components/HitlReviewTab.tsx. Swap fetch URLs to /api/jobs/*. Keep the slider+thumbs-up/down UX intact.
acceptance_criteria: Submit posts, success toast, modal stays open with refreshed data

tasks.title: Create /jobs/history page
tasks.details: Reuse JobsTable in 'history' mode (no since-filter). Hides pipeline-control UI.
acceptance_criteria: Page renders without re-implementing table logic

tasks.title: Create /jobs/sessions page + SessionsTable
tasks.details: Port SessionsTable.tsx from greenhouse. Fetches GET /api/sessions (need to expose this — fold into 6.4 or add a dedicated route).
acceptance_criteria: Table renders with sort/filter

tasks.title: Create /jobs/companies/[token] page + CompanyProfile
tasks.details: Port CompanyProfile.tsx — Recharts radar/pie/bar + Leaflet map with marker clusters. Wrap Leaflet in client-only island. Use existing chart color tokens from src/frontend/styles/charts.ts (port if missing).
acceptance_criteria: All five visualizations render against real data

tasks.title: Create PipelineProgress (WebSocket) component
tasks.details: Opens WebSocket to /api/jobs/scan/ws. Consumes ScanProgress events and renders progress UI inside CommandCenter's pipeline modal.
acceptance_criteria: UI updates in real time during a scan

tasks.title: Refactor /config page into multi-tab layout
tasks.details: Wrap existing editors in shadcn Tabs (Resume, Career Stories, Agent Rules, Prompts, Compensation, Templates). Persist active tab via ?tab= query param. Each existing editor component is unchanged — it just becomes the body of one TabsContent.
acceptance_criteria: Existing /config behavior unchanged when no ?tab=
Reload preserves active tab via URL

tasks.title: Create JobBoardsTab
tasks.details: Port SettingsPanel.tsx from greenhouse — board-token CRUD using /api/jobs/tokens. Add as 'Job Boards' TabsTrigger in ConfigTabs.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: Tab visible at /config?tab=job-boards
Add/toggle/remove flows persist to D1

tasks.title: Create /applications page + ApplicationsTable
tasks.details: Kanban grouped by status (preparing | applied | interviewing | offer | rejected | withdrawn | archived). Toggle to table view (sort + filter). Row click → /roles/:id.
acceptance_criteria: Both views render against real /api/roles data

tasks.title: Update Sidebar with Jobs + Applications
tasks.details: Add 'Jobs' group with sub-items: Command Center (/jobs), History (/jobs/history), Sessions (/jobs/sessions), Companies (/jobs/companies). Add top-level 'Applications' link → /applications.
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar collapses correctly on mobile

tasks.title: Update /roles/[id] page for greenhouse-sourced roles
tasks.details: When role.source === 'greenhouse_scan' && role.source_snapshot_id, surface two extra buttons in the role header: 'View original posting (PDF)' (opens JobPdfViewer) and 'Re-analyze' (POST /api/jobs/:job_site_id/reprocess).
acceptance_criteria: Buttons hidden when source is not greenhouse_scan

tasks.title: Implement notebook-questions builder
tasks.details: Already created in 5.5; this task covers the actual implementation. generateNotebookQuestions(env, posting, candidateStories) → string[]. Use generateStructuredOutput with gpt-oss-120b and the QuestionsSchema.
acceptance_criteria: Returns 5–8 questions
Each question references a specific job requirement

tasks.title: Add 6 new health modules
tasks.details: Add: vectorize (env.VECTORIZE_JOBS.query), r2Jobs (env.R2_JOBS_BUCKET.head), googleAiStudio (embedJobsQuery 'ping' + assert dim 768), greenhouseApi (HEAD https://boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/cloudflare/jobs), jobScanner (DO checkHealth), jobAnalysis (DO checkHealth). Each follows the existing module shape: { name, status, latencyMs, error?, details? }.
acceptance_criteria: Total 16 modules in the health output
Each new module returns latency or error within 5s

tasks.title: Add second cron branch in _worker.ts scheduled handler
tasks.details: Branch on event.cron: '0 */4 * * *' → existing health screening. '0 */6 * * *' → if global_config.pipeline_enabled === true: env.JOB_SCANNER_AGENT.idFromName('singleton').get().scanAll(). Use ctx.waitUntil for the long-running call.
acceptance_criteria: Both crons fire on schedule (verify with Trigger Cron Event in dashboard)
Pipeline cron is a no-op when pipeline_enabled is false

tasks.title: Seed pipeline_enabled flag in global_config
tasks.details: On first boot, ensure global_config has key 'pipeline_enabled' (value 'false') if missing. Implement as a small idempotent seed in JobBoardsTab on mount, OR as a one-shot helper called from the health-service initialization path.
acceptance_criteria: global_config 'pipeline_enabled' row exists after first request to /api/health

tasks.title: Local end-to-end smoke test
tasks.details: Follow PRD Phase 13 steps 1–12 against pnpm run dev locally.
acceptance_criteria: All 12 steps pass without manual intervention
/health shows all 16 modules green or yellow with explanations

tasks.title: Production deploy + smoke test
tasks.details: Run pnpm run deploy. Visit production URL. Repeat steps 5–11 from PRD Phase 13 against the remote deployment.
acceptance_criteria: Deploy succeeds (build → migrate:remote → wrangler deploy)
All smoke tests pass on production
